blended.narrative: Arapahoe Basin is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 8,036 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 35".
